data.name: Award.FreeGachaTip
data.value: If there is no free single pull, it will not be used.

data.name: Award.GachaWarning
data.value: It's a dangerous feature and may result in a mis-pull. By pressing ｢Confirm｣, you understand and accept the possible risks.

data.name: Award.Mining
data.value: Collect daily Orundum reward from mining permit

data.name: Award.Orundum
data.value: Collect daily Orundum reward from Lucky Wall

data.name: Award.Recruit
data.value: Conduct daily free single pull from the limited banner

data.name: Award.RecruitTip
data.value: This is a high-risk option and may cause mis-pulls.

data.name: Common.LoadingTaskHint
data.value: Select a task from the left list first.

data.name: ContinueRefresh
data.value: No recruitment permit, trying to refresh Tags

data.name: Copilot.List.ClearAllConfirm.Message
data.value: All copilot tasks in the battle list will be removed. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ClearPersistFail
data.value: Delete all failed: list save failed.

data.name: Copilot.Error.CurrentPayloadNotObject
data.value: Current copilot payload must be a single JSON object.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ImportClipboardRetry
data.value: Failed to import from clipboard. Check path or JSON content.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ImportFileRetry
data.value: Failed to import copilot file. Check file path and JSON format.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ListEmptyStageName
data.value: Found item(s) with empty stage name.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ListItemMissingSource
data.value: The selected item has no available source.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ListLegacyMissingTab
data.value: Battle list contains legacy items without tab info. Re-add them in the correct tab.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ListMixedTabs
data.value: Battle list cannot mix Main/Story/SideStory with Paradox Simulation.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ListNoChecked
data.value: Battle list mode is enabled but no item is checked.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ListTabMismatch
data.value: Battle list tab mismatch: current tab is `{0}`, list tab is `{1}`.

data.name: Copilot.Error.LoadSetNoRecognized
data.value: No recognizable copilot entries found in set.

data.name: Copilot.Error.LoadSetNotArray
data.value: Copilot set must be a JSON array.

data.name: Copilot.Error.LoadedFeedbackMissingId
data.value: Current copilot has no feedback ID.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ReadListInvalidJson
data.value: Failed to read copilot list: invalid JSON. {0}

data.name: Copilot.Error.ReadListMissingName
data.value: Failed to read copilot list: list items missing recognizable fields (e.g. name).

data.name: Copilot.Error.ReadListNotArray
data.value: Failed to read copilot list: payload must be a JSON array.

data.name: Copilot.Error.SelectTaskForFeedback
data.value: Select a copilot item to submit feedback.

data.name: Copilot.Error.SelectTaskToRemove
data.value: Select a copilot item to remove.

data.name: Copilot.Error.SelectTaskToSort
data.value: Select a copilot item to sort.

data.name: Copilot.Error.SelectTaskToUpdate
data.value: Select a copilot item to update.

data.name: Copilot.Error.StartInputMissingSource
data.value: Current copilot has no executable source (file path or JSON content).

data.name: Copilot.Error.StartRunOwnerBlocked
data.value: Copilot start blocked: current run owner is `{0}`.

data.name: Copilot.Error.StartSelectTask
data.value: Select a copilot item to execute.

data.name: Copilot.Error.StopRunOwnerBlocked
data.value: Copilot stop blocked: current run owner is `{0}`.

data.name: Copilot.RunOwnerBlockedDialog.Message
data.value: {0} is still running. Stop the current task before starting Copilot.

data.name: Copilot.Error.ValidateTabMismatch
data.value: Selected copilot does not match current tab.

data.name: Copilot.HelpText
data.value:
Tips:
1. Make sure the copilot matches the selected tab.
2. Main/Story/SideStory: start on a page where the bottom-right action button is visible.
3. SSS: built-in files are in resource/copilot. Prepare formation first and start on a page with deploy/start button. Loop is supported.
4. Paradox: select skill first and start from the simulation page. If battle list is used, start from operator list.
5. When using friend support, disable Auto squad and Battle list, choose operators manually, then start.
6. Favorite marks may affect Auto squad recognition. Remove marks or disable Auto squad if needed.
7. Secret codes from copilot site can be pasted with the right-side buttons: ● 2nd button: add single copilot ● 3rd button: add copilot set
8. Battle list: ● Verify stage name below (e.g. CV-EX-1). ● Add: left=normal, right=raid. ● Delete all: removes all tasks. ● Start from a page where target stage is visible. Cross-chapter navigation is unsupported. ● The run stops automatically on sanity shortage, battle failure, or non-3-star result.

data.name: Copilot.Hint.ListPanelDisabled
data.value: The single copilot from the input box will be executed.

data.name: Copilot.Hint.ListPanelEnabled
data.value: Checked items in battle list will be executed.

data.name: Copilot.Rating.Prompt
data.value: How is this copilot? Leave feedback.

data.name: Copilot.Status.AddCurrentRaidSuccess
data.value: Raid copilot added to battle list.

data.name: Copilot.Status.AlreadyBottom
data.value: Selected item is already at the bottom.

data.name: Copilot.Status.AlreadyTop
data.value: Selected item is already at the top.

data.name: Copilot.Status.ClearCancelled
data.value: Deleting all copilot tasks was cancelled.

data.name: Copilot.Status.ImportClipboardFailed
data.value: Failed to import copilot from clipboard.

data.name: Copilot.Status.ImportClipboardPersistRollback
data.value: Clipboard copilot imported, but list save failed and was rolled back.

data.name: Copilot.Status.ImportFilePersistRollback
data.value: Copilot imported, but list save failed and was rolled back.

data.name: Copilot.Status.LoadSetAddedCount
data.value: Added {0} copilot item(s) to battle list.

data.name: Copilot.Status.UpdateListItemNameFailed
data.value: Failed to update copilot item name.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.AddList
data.value: Left click: normal Right click: raid

data.name: Copilot.Tip.AutoSquad
data.value: Auto squad may miss operators marked as Favorite.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.BattleList
data.value:
Supported modes only: 1. Main: navigate in the same chapter 2. SideStory: navigate in current page 3. Story Collection: navigate in current page 4. Paradox Simulation: launch from operator list Please start from the correct screen. Cross-chapter navigation is unsupported.
When enabled, selecting one copilot auto-adds it to battle list.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.ClearList
data.value: Delete all copilot tasks in the battle list.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.File
data.value: You can also drag a copilot file here.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.IgnoreRequirements
data.value: Some copilot files require modules or other prerequisites. Enabling this may skip checks and can cause failures.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.Paste
data.value: Read clipboard and add as copilot

data.name: Copilot.Tip.PasteSet
data.value: Read clipboard and add as copilot set

data.name: Copilot.Tip.UseSupportUnit
data.value: Missing one may still work, but missing more usually fails.

data.name: Copilot.Tip.UserAdditionalFormat
data.value: Use ';' to split entries and ',' to split name/skill, e.g. Exusiai,3;Eyjafjalla,1

data.name: Copilot.Warn.ListSingleItem
data.value: Battle list mode is used with only one item. Direct run is recommended.

data.name: CopilotUserAdditionalNameInvalid
data.value: Additional custom {key=Operator} name invalid: {0}, please check spelling

data.name: CreditFight
data.value: Combat with Support to earn Credits

data.name: CreditFullOnlyBuyDiscount
data.value: Doctor! Purchasing only discounted items has caused an overflow in credits! Be cautious of wasting credits! Remaining credits:

data.name: FailedToOpenClient
data.value: Failed to open the client. Please check the configuration file

data.name: Fight.AllowUseStoneSaveWarning
data.value: This function is considered dangerous. Pressing the ｢Confirm｣ button indicates that you understand and are willing to accept the potential risks.

data.name: Fight.DrGrandetTip
data.value: Wait on the sanity confirmation screen until the current sanity recovers to 1 point, then confirm immediately.

data.name: Fight.SeriesTip
data.value:
• AUTO: Automatically identify the maximum proxy multiplier of the level, maintain the maximum proxy multiplier and do not overflow sanity after using sanity potion
• Value (1~6): Execute proxy according to the set multiplier If the current sanity is not enough to complete the set multiplier (such as only enough for 5 times but set to 6 times), you cannot enter the battle Or If the number of battles is not enough to complete the set multiplier (such as only enough for 5 times but set to 6 times), you will not be able to enter the battle
• Don't Switch: Do not adjust the proxy multiplier setting in the game

data.name: Fight.SpecifiedDropsTip
data.value: This feature does not auto-calculate optimal stage.

data.name: Fight.UseExpiringMedicine
data.value: Unlimited use of expiring (<48h) sanity potion

data.name: Fight.CustomStageCodeTip
data.value: Support most main stage names and stage names from the original list.

data.name: Fight.MultiTasksShareTip
data.value: The following options are shared across multiple tasks.

data.name: Fight.UseWeeklyScheduleTip
data.value: The day of week here follows in-game reset time rather than local clock time.

data.name: FightMissionFailedAndStop
data.value: Proxy failed too many times, task stopped

data.name: FightTimesUnused
data.value: Completed {0} battles, will execute {1} multiplier proxy next time, will complete {2} battles after entering, exceeds {3} limit, will not enter battle

data.name: Infrast.CustomPlanToolTip
data.value: If periods exist in plan config, time-rotation can auto pick by current time.

data.name: Infrast.Error.ParseFailed
data.value: Failed to parse custom infrast file.

data.name: Infrast.Error.PlanOutOfRange
data.value: Plan index {0} is out of range for `{1}`.

data.name: Infrast.ModeRotationTip
data.value: Please configure in-game preset queues before using rotation mode.

data.name: Infrast.ModeRotationToolTip
data.value: Rotation mode follows queue presets configured in game.

data.name: Infrast.NotStationedTip
data.value: Enabled: keep training-room operators, but workshop operators also will not enter dorms.

data.name: Infrast.ThresholdTip
data.value: When custom shift is enabled, this field only affects autofill or grouped-operator rooms.

data.name: Issue.CustomTaskNameInvalid
data.value: Custom task name format is invalid. Enter plain text task names only.

data.name: Issue.CustomTaskNameUnknown
data.value: Custom task name is not recognized.

data.name: Issue.CustomTaskNamesEmpty
data.value: Custom task names list is empty.

data.name: Issue.CustomTaskNamesNormalized
data.value: Custom task names were normalized and deduplicated.

data.name: Issue.DelimitedInputParseFailed
data.value: Input format is invalid. Use commas, semicolons, or line breaks to separate items.

data.name: Issue.FightDropMissing
data.value: Enter a drop id when target drop is enabled.

data.name: Issue.FightSeriesOutOfRange
data.value: Fight series must be between -1 and 6.

data.name: Issue.FightTimesMayNotExhausted
data.value: Times may not be fully exhausted under current series.

data.name: Issue.FightTimesOutOfRange
data.value: Fight times cannot be less than 0.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationClearStoreIgnoredInArchive
data.value: ClearStore is ignored in archive mode and was disabled.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationIncrementModeOutOfRange
data.value: Increment mode must be 0 or 1 and was normalized.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationModeInvalid
data.value: This reclamation mode is not supported. Choose another mode.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationNumCraftBatchesOutOfRange
data.value: NumCraftBatches must be in 0..99999 and was normalized.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationThemeUnknown
data.value: Unknown reclamation theme, fallback to Tales.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationToolNameInvalid
data.value: Tool list format is invalid. Enter one tool name per item in plain text.

data.name: Issue.ReclamationToolsIgnoredInNoArchive
data.value: ToolsToCraft is ignored in no-archive mode and was cleared.

data.name: Issue.RecruitTimeOutOfRange
data.value: Recruit time must be between 60 and 540, in 10-minute steps.

data.name: Issue.RecruitTimesOutOfRange
data.value: Recruit times cannot be less than 0.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeDifficultyOutOfRange
data.value: Difficulty must be >= -1 and was normalized.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeEliteTwoModeMismatch
data.value: StartWithEliteTwo is invalid for current mode/theme/squad and was disabled.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeEliteTwoSupportConflict
data.value: UseSupport conflicts with StartWithEliteTwo; elite-two start was disabled.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeFindPlaytimeTargetOutOfRange
data.value: FindPlaytime target must be in 1..3 and was normalized.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeInvestmentsCountOutOfRange
data.value: Investments count must be >= 0 and was normalized.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeModeInvalid
data.value: This roguelike mode is not supported. Choose another mode.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeRefreshTraderThemeMismatch
data.value: Refresh trader with dice only works on Mizuki; auto-disabled.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeStartFoldartalListTrimmed
data.value: Start foldartal list exceeded 3 items and was trimmed.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeStartsCountOutOfRange
data.value: Starts count must be >= 0 and was normalized.

data.name: Issue.RoguelikeThemeUnknown
data.value: Unknown roguelike theme, fallback to JieGarden.

data.name: Issue.TaskFieldMissing
data.value: Some required settings are missing. Please check this task.

data.name: Issue.TaskFieldTypeInvalid
data.value: Some settings use an invalid value. Please check the options you just edited.

data.name: Main.CloseConfirm.Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: Main.CloseConfirm.Update.Message
data.value: An update is in progress. Exiting MAA now may cause resource damage. Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: Main.Growl.ManualResourceUpdate
data.value: Manual resource update: Settings > Version Update

data.name: Main.Growl.ManualVersionUpdate
data.value: Manual update entry: Settings > Version Update

data.value: Resource update available. Run resource check

data.name: Mall.CreditFight
data.value: Combat with Support to earn Credits

data.name: Mall.CreditFightTip
data.value: Combat with Support Unit in OF-1 after Visit Friends to earn 30 credits. This function is invalid when stage is Cur/Last. Do not enable this when OF-1 is locked.

data.name: Mall.Drink
data.value: Would you like a drink🍷? doctor

data.name: Mall.InfrastReceptionMessageBoardReceive
data.value: Credit collection from message board in Reception Room

data.name: Mall.OnlyDiscountTip
data.value: ⚠ Caution: Risk of credit overflow! Whitelisted non-discount items can still be purchased.

data.name: Mall.ReceptionOptionsRequireInfrast
data.value: The following functions require configuration and execution in Infrast.

data.name: Mall.Reserve
data.value: Stop purchasing items when credits below 300

data.name: Mall.ReserveTip
data.value: Whitelisted items can still be purchased even when credit is below 300.

data.name: MissingOperators
data.value: {key=Operator}s of the following {key=Operator} groups are missing:

data.name: PlatformCapability.Error.AutostartUnsupported
data.value: Autostart is unsupported in the current environment

data.name: PlatformCapability.Error.HotkeyUnsupported
data.value: Global hotkeys are unsupported in the current environment

data.name: PlatformCapability.Error.NotificationUnsupported
data.value: Notifications are unsupported in the current environment

data.name: PlatformCapability.Error.OverlayUnsupported
data.value: Overlay is unsupported in the current environment

data.name: PlatformCapability.Error.TrayFallback
data.value: Tray downgraded to the window menu

data.name: PlatformCapability.Error.TrayUnsupported
data.value: Tray is unsupported in the current environment

data.name: PostAction.Cmd.Watermark
data.value: Leave empty to downgrade to logging only

data.name: PostAction.HibernateTip
data.value: You need to enable the hibernate feature in Windows power options, otherwise this feature will be invalid.

data.name: PostAction.OnceTip
PostAction.Unsupported
data.value: This action is unsupported on current platform and will be downgraded to logging.

data.name: PostAction.Warn.IfNoOtherNeedsSystemAction
data.value: `IfNoOtherMaa` requires at least one system action (Sleep/Hibernate/Shutdown).

data.name: PostAction.Warn.UnsupportedDowngrade
data.value: Some selected post actions are not executable and will be downgraded to logging.

data.name: ProductIncorrect
data.value: Product does NOT match the configuration.

data.name: Reclamation.EarlyTip
data.value:
The support for reclamation algorithm is still under development at present. Please mind the following:
Farm points through initial setup: (Be careful that existing save files might be deleted) 1. After reaching the maximum points, it will output ｢Task Completed｣ and automatically stop the task. 2. Cannot be used when squads are not empty (simply clear the current squad). 3. Manually check and delete save files to prevent MAA from deleting your valuable saves. 4. Navigation is not yet implemented, so the task cannot be started from locations outside the Reclamation mode. 5. If an error occurs during the task or the task completes without reaching the maximum points, please submit an issue on GitHub.
With save file: farm points through crafting (advanced). 1. It must be the first day after settlement, and there should be no enemy attacks entering the stationed area for the next three days. 2. It must start after entering the interface of the large map. (stationed location needs to be visible) 3. If the quantity that can be manufactured is exactly a multiple of 99, MAA can get confused (stuck). You can use up a little before saving. This might be repaired later.

data.name: Reclamation.Option.Mode.Archive
data.value: I do have a save, let's farm prosperity points by crafting tools.

data.name: Reclamation.Option.Mode.NoArchive
data.value: I do not have a save, let's farm prosperity points by repeatedly entering and exiting stages.

data.name: Reclamation.Option.Theme.FireClosed
data.value: Fire Within the Sand (The event is not open)

data.name: ReclamationPisModeError
data.value: Current task mode requires you to have a save with craftable items. Please consider switching modes.

data.name: ReclamationPnsModeError
data.value: Currently using no-save task mode. Please manually delete existing save and try again. If you wish to keep the save, please consider switching modes.

data.name: Recruit.HighPriorityTip
data.value: High-priority tags follow WPF logic and use client-side recruit tags.

data.name: Recruit.NotChooseLevel1Tip
data.value: When robot tag is detected, 1-star combinations will not be auto-confirmed.

data.name: Recruit.Option.ExtraTags.Default
data.value: Additional Tags are not selected by default

data.name: Recruit.Option.ExtraTags.RareOnly
data.value: Pick as many high-star Tags as possible

data.name: Recruit.Option.ExtraTags.SelectAll
data.value: If higher ★ tags appear, always select 3 tags

data.name: Recruit.UseExpeditedTip
data.value: Same behavior as WPF: expedited permit is preferred when enabled.

data.name: Roguelike.CollectibleModeShopping
data.value: Enable shopping in the grinding mode

data.name: Roguelike.CoreCharTip
data.value: If not filled out, the default policy will be used.

data.name: Roguelike.DelayAbortUntilCombatComplete
data.value: Don't abort Auto IS until the end of battle

data.name: Roguelike.ExpectedCollapsalParadigmsTip
data.value: Separate with ｢;｣. Leave blank to use the default list.

data.name: Roguelike.FirstFloorFoldartal
data.value: Repeat for foldartal foreseed first floor, No Battle

data.name: Roguelike.JieGardenDifficultyTip
data.value: For JieGarden, command-skip routing requires related tech unlock. Do not choose N3+ before unlocking.

data.name: Roguelike.MultiTaskSharedTip
data.value: The following options are for multiple tasks.

data.name: Roguelike.OnlyStartWithEliteTwo
data.value: Only Repeat for ｢{key=StartingCoreChar}｣ Elite 2, No Battle

data.name: Roguelike.StartFoldartalList
data.value: Start with ｢Life Prioritizing Squad｣ and acquire the cypherboard

data.name: Roguelike.StartFoldartalTip
data.value: Write up to three and separate with ｢;｣

data.name: Roguelike.StopAtMaxLevel
data.value: Stop when max level is achieved

data.name: Roguelike.StopWhenInvestmentFull
data.value: Stops when invested coins reach limit

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyCollapse
data.value: Farm collapse paradigms, restart immediately after encountering a non-rare collapse paradigm

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyDeepExploration
data.value: Grind Deep Investigation, clear as far as possible

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyExp
data.value: Gain Experience Points, clear as many nodes as possible

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyFindPlaytime
data.value: Farm playtime nodes, enter the cave on the first floor, restart if target node not found

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyGold
data.value: Invests coins, exits automatically after investment completes

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyLastReward
data.value: Grind to obtain Hot Water Kettle or Elite 2 {key=Operator}s

data.name: RoguelikeStrategyMonthlySquad
data.value: Grind Monthly Squad, clear as far as possible

data.name: RoomGroupsMatchFailed
data.value: Failed to match {key=Operator} groups, group list:

data.name: RoutingRestartTooManyBattles
data.value: Too many battles ahead: {0}, restarting route

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ConfirmBlocked1
data.value: You haven't finished reading. Please confirm after you finish.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.DoNotRemindThisAnnouncementAgain
data.value: Do not show this announcement again

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadProgress.PendingTitle
data.value: Scroll to the bottom to unlock confirm.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadProgress.PendingCaption
data.value: Keep scrolling through every section. Confirm and do-not-remind will unlock together when you reach the end.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadProgress.PendingFooterHint
data.value: This option unlocks after you finish reading, so the full action area stays together and easy to scan.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadProgress.ReadyCaption
data.value: You can confirm now, and you can choose not to show this announcement again.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadProgress.ReadyFooterHint
data.value: If you do not want to see this announcement again until it changes, tick the option on the left and confirm from the button on the right.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.SectionsCaption
data.value: Choose a section on the left to read the full announcement.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.Lead
data.value: Please read the latest announcement carefully before closing this window.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.BottomHint
data.value: Unread announcements cannot be dismissed yet.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadHint
data.value: Scroll to the bottom before closing, or hide this announcement until the next update.

data.name: Settings.About.Dialog.ReadFinishedHint
data.value: Announcement fully read. You can close this dialog now.

data.name: Settings.About.Status.AnnouncementInfoEmpty
data.value: No announcement content is currently available.

data.name: Settings.Achievement.Dialog.EmptyDescription
data.value: Try a different keyword or filter.

data.name: Settings.Achievement.Status.DialogOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open achievement list dialog.

data.name: Settings.Achievement.Status.PolicySummary
data.value: Current policy: popup disabled={0}; auto close={1}; unlocked {2}/{3}

data.name: Settings.Background.Note
data.value: Background image and blur settings use Windows-compatible key names. If the path is invalid, this GUI save will be blocked.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.AutoSavedCurrent
data.value: Changes to the current profile are saved automatically

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Dialog.DamagedFilesNoImport
data.value: The following files are corrupted, so no profiles were imported: {0}.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Error.ImportNoUsableEntries
data.value: No usable profile entries were found in the import file.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Error.ImportNoValidProfile
data.value: No valid profiles were found in the import file.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.LegacyFilenameInvalid
data.value: The legacy profile file name is invalid. Please choose gui.json or gui.new.json.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.LegacyDirectoryMissingBoth
data.value: The selected folder does not contain gui.new.json or gui.json.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.LegacyDirectoryMissingGui
data.value: The selected folder does not contain gui.json.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.LegacyDirectoryMissingGuiNew
data.value: The selected folder does not contain gui.new.json.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.LegacyInvalidFilesOnly
data.value: The selection contains legacy profile files with invalid names.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.LegacyInvalidFilesWithMissing
data.value: {0}, plus legacy profile files with invalid names.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.TooManyFiles
data.value: Legacy import supports at most two files; unified config JSON supports only one file.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.UnifiedSingleFileOnly
data.value: Unified config JSON supports only one file.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.UnifiedDirectoryMissing
data.value: No config/avalonia.json or avalonia.json was found in the selected folder.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Import.UnrecognizedFiles
data.value: The selected import files are not recognized. Please choose an exported profile JSON, gui.json, or gui.new.json.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.ImportMode.ManualDescription
data.value: Supports new and legacy configs. For legacy configs, select both gui.new.json and gui.json.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.SaveAsNewFailedReason.ProfileAlreadyExists
data.value: Choose a profile name that is not in use.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.SaveAsNewFailedReason.SourceProfileMissing
data.value: The current profile is missing. Refresh the list and try again.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Status.DeleteSwitchedCurrent
data.value: Profile `{0}` was deleted. Switched to profile `{1}`.

data.name: Settings.ConfigurationManager.Status.ImportSucceededWithRename
data.value: Imported {0} profile(s) ({1} renamed to avoid conflicts).

data.name: Settings.Connect.AttachWindowWarning
data.value: Attach-window mode supports desktop window connections only.

data.name: Settings.Connect.AutoDetectTip
data.value: If connection fails, disable auto-detect and enter the address manually

data.name: Settings.Connect.Error.AutoReplaceUnsupported
data.value: Automatic ADB replacement is not supported on the current system.

data.name: Settings.Connect.Error.ReplaceAdbExtractedNotFound
data.value: Failed to replace ADB: extracted adb executable not found.

data.name: Settings.Connect.Hint.AdbPathDirectoryMissingExecutable
data.value: ADB path is a directory, but adb executable was not found in it: {0}

data.name: Settings.Connect.Hint.AdbPathMissingDriveSlash
data.value: ADB path format looks invalid (missing slash after drive letter): {0}

data.name: Settings.Connect.Hint.AdbPathWindowsPathOnNonWindows
data.value: Current system is {0}, but ADB path looks like a Windows path: {1}

data.name: Settings.Connect.Hint.ConnectionAddressEmpty
data.value: Connection address is empty. Enter "IP:port" and try again.

data.name: Settings.Connect.KillAdbOnExit
data.value: Terminate the ADB process on exit

data.name: Settings.ExternalNotification.DefaultMessage
data.value: This is a MAA external notification test message. If you can see this, notifications are working.

data.name: Settings.ExternalNotification.Error.ParameterKeyEmpty
data.value: Invalid parameter format (line {0}). Key cannot be empty.

data.name: Settings.ExternalNotification.Error.Unsupported
data.value: External notification is unsupported in this environment: {0} ({1})

data.name: Settings.ExternalNotification.OnlyCompleteNote
data.value: By default, only a summary is sent when a task completes. You can also enable error and timeout notifications if needed.

data.name: Settings.ExternalNotification.ProviderParametersNote
data.value: Fill in the JSON parameters required by your notification provider.

data.name: Settings.GUI.Note
data.value: Hide/menu behavior follows the Windows client. GUI auto-save is enabled (instant for checkboxes, commit-based for text).

data.name: Settings.GUI.SoftwareRendering.RestartDialog.Message
data.value: Software rendering was saved. Close and reload MAA to apply it. Reload now?

data.name: Settings.GUI.SoftwareRendering.RestartManualClose
data.value: A new instance has started. Close the current instance to finish reloading.

data.name: Settings.GUI.SoftwareRendering.RestartPending
data.value: Software rendering was saved. Reload MAA later to apply it.

data.name: Settings.Game.BlockSleepWithScreenOn
data.value: Prevent sleep and keep the screen awake

data.name: Settings.Hotkey.Capture.Error.RequireModifier
data.value: At least one modifier key is required.

data.name: Settings.Hotkey.Capture.Guide
data.value: Recording rules: press at least one modifier plus one non-modifier key. Esc cancels. Backspace/Delete clears the binding.

data.name: Settings.Hotkey.Capture.Status.ClearedPending
data.value: Binding cleared. Click Register Hotkeys to apply the change.

data.name: Settings.Hotkey.Capture.Status.UpdatedPending
data.value: Shortcut updated locally. Click Register Hotkeys to apply the change.

data.name: Settings.Hotkey.Error.PersistenceFailed
data.value: Hotkeys were updated, but persistence failed: {0}

data.name: Settings.Hotkey.Status.PersistenceFailed
data.value: {0}: Hotkeys were updated, but persistence failed.

data.name: Settings.IssueReport.DeveloperModeNote
data.value: When enabled, debugging actions are shown. Use it only for troubleshooting.

data.name: Settings.IssueReport.CheckUpdateBeforeReportingIssue
data.value: Please upgrade first and test if the issue persists in the new version. Confirm it's not a common issue before reporting.

data.name: Settings.IssueReport.CheckHelpBeforeReportingIssue
data.value: Please check the ｢{key=Help}｣ before reporting any issues.

data.name: Settings.IssueReport.PreflightNote
data.value: Read the FAQ before submitting feedback. Attaching the log archive helps with troubleshooting.

data.name: Settings.IssueReport.Status.ImageCacheAlreadyEmpty
data.value: Image cache directory is already empty: {0}

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.RestartDialog.Message
data.value: GPU settings were saved. Close and reload MAA to apply them. Reload now?

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.RestartManualClose
data.value: A new instance has started. Close the current instance to finish reloading.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.RestartPending
data.value: GPU settings were saved. Reload MAA later to apply them.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.RestartRequired
data.value: Changes usually take effect after restarting the app.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Status.DetectionFailed
data.value: GPU capability probing failed, so GPU options are temporarily disabled. See the debug logs for details.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Status.Unsupported
data.value: GPU OCR is not supported on this platform. Only Windows builds apply this setting.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Status.WindowsReady
data.value: This Windows build supports GPU OCR and the setting will take effect after restart.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Warning.Deprecated
data.value: The selected GPU is marked as deprecated. Prefer a newer GPU or CPU OCR when possible.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Warning.OutdatedDriver
data.value: The selected GPU driver is outdated and may not be fully compatible with DirectML.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Warning.SelectionFallback
data.value: The saved GPU selection is unavailable in the current environment and was reset to a safe fallback.

data.name: Settings.Performance.Gpu.Warning.Unsupported
data.value: This build does not apply GPU OCR on the current platform.

data.name: Settings.RemoteControl.Error.Unsupported
data.value: Remote control connectivity test is unsupported in this environment: {0} ({1})

data.name: Settings.RemoteControl.Status.SaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save remote control settings.

data.name: Settings.RemoteControl.Warning
data.value: The remote control API is experimental. Use it only on trusted networks.

data.name: Settings.Start.ApplyOnNextExecution
data.value: Will take effect on the next run

data.name: Settings.Start.ApplyOnNextLaunch
data.value: Will take effect on the next launch

data.name: Settings.Start.AutoStartMaa
data.value: Start MAA automatically with the system

data.name: Settings.Start.AutoStartMaaTip
data.value: Only works on systems that support startup registration

data.name: Settings.Start.EmulatorExtraArgsTip
data.value: Arguments passed to the emulator launch command

data.name: Settings.Start.EmulatorPathTip
data.value: This path is used when launching the emulator

data.name: Settings.Start.EmulatorWaitSecondsNote
data.value: Wait before connecting so the emulator can finish starting

data.name: Settings.Start.RetryOnDisconnectedTip
data.value: Recommended when automatic connection address detection is enabled

data.name: Settings.StartPerformance.Status.SyncCoreInstanceOptionsFailed
data.value: Failed to sync core instance options: {0} {1}

data.name: Settings.StartPerformance.Validation.EmulatorPathRequired
data.value: Emulator path is required when automatic emulator launch is enabled.

data.name: Settings.StartPerformance.Validation.EmulatorWaitSecondsOutOfRange
data.value: Emulator wait seconds must be within {0}-{1}.

data.name: Settings.StartPerformance.Validation.GpuFallbackApplied
data.value: Unsupported GPU settings were removed on this platform. CPU OCR fallback will be used.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Validation.ProfileNotFound
data.value: Selected profile "{1}" for timer {0} does not exist.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Validation.ProfileRequired
data.value: Timer {0} must select a profile when custom configuration is enabled.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Validation.SlotCountMismatch
data.value: Timer slot count is invalid. Expected {0}, got {1}.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Validation.SlotIndexOutOfRange
data.value: Timer slot index must be within 1-{0}, got {1}.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Warning.CurrentProfileFallback
data.value: Current profile is unavailable. Timer settings fell back to "{0}".

data.name: Settings.Timer.Warning.HourClamped
data.value: Timer {0} hour was clamped from {1} to {2}.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Warning.HourParseFallback
data.value: Timer {0} hour could not be parsed and fell back to {1}.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Warning.MinuteClamped
data.value: Timer {0} minute was clamped from {1} to {2}.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Warning.MinuteParseFallback
data.value: Timer {0} minute could not be parsed and fell back to {1}.

data.name: Settings.Timer.Warning.ProfileFallback
data.value: Selected profile "{1}" for timer {0} was not found and fell back to "{2}".

data.name: Settings.StartPerformance.Warning.EmulatorWaitSecondsClamped
data.value: Emulator wait seconds were clamped from {0} to {1}.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.WindowsManualUpdateRequired
data.value: The Windows release is not published yet. Please update manually.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.LinuxPortableZipManualInstallRequired
data.value: The Linux portable package has been downloaded. Extract it to a new directory and launch the AppImage there.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.MirrorCdkRemainingDays
data.value: MirrorChyan CDK has {0:F1} day(s) left (until {1:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}).

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.PersistFailed
data.value: Update result was refreshed, but failed to save into configuration.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.MirrorChyanCdkRequired
data.value: Please go to Settings > Version Update to configure a MirrorChyan CDK or switch the update source.

data.name: VersionUpdate.Log.Resource.CheckFailedHttp
data.value: Resource update check failed with HTTP {0}.

data.name: VersionUpdate.Log.Resource.AlreadyLatest
data.value: Resources are already up to date.

data.name: VersionUpdate.Log.Resource.AvailableRequiresCdk
data.value: Resource update available: {0}. MirrorChyan CDK required for direct download.

data.name: VersionUpdate.Log.Software.PackageReady
data.value: Software update package is ready to apply after restart.

data.name: VersionUpdate.Log.Software.NamedPackageReady
data.value: Software update package {0} is ready to apply after restart.

data.name: VersionUpdate.Log.Software.AlreadyLatest
data.value: Software is already up to date on {0}.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.SaveChannelFailed
data.value: Failed to save update channel settings.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.Status.SaveProxyFailed
data.value: Failed to save update proxy settings.

data.name: MultiInstanceUnderSamePath
data.value: Only one instance can be launched under the same path! If you want to run multiple MAA at the same time, please copy the whole MAA and start under different path with the same adb and different connect address.

data.name: Startup.LinuxPortablePackageMissing
data.value: The Linux portable package is incomplete. Please extract the full package, then launch MAAUnified.AppImage from that directory.

data.name: SlowAndSteadyWinsTheRace
data.value: Slow and Steady Wins the Race (Defender, Caster, Sniper)

data.name: StartUp.AccountSwitchTip
data.value: Fill in the account that needs to be switched to, leave blank to close the account switching. Enter the content displayed on the login interface, such as ｢123****4567｣, you can enter ｢123****4567｣ or ｢4567｣ or ｢23****45｣ Only supports Official(CN) and Bilibili server. Login account is not supported.

data.name: StartUp.AutoDetectConnectionTip
data.value: This checkbox will be automatically unchecked after each detect is completed, and can be checked again if you need to re-detect

data.name: StartUp.ConnectionAddressTip
data.value: It will be filled in automatically when you use it for the first time. If you encounter any problems, you can try to manually modify it

data.name: StartingCoreCharTip
data.value: If not filled out, the default policy will be used.

data.name: TaskQueue.DailyStageHintDefault
data.value: Daily stage hints will be shown after resources are loaded.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.EditBlockedWhileRunning
data.value: Task queue editing is blocked while running.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.SelectTaskToMove
data.value: Select a task to move first.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.SelectTaskToRemove
data.value: Select a task to remove first.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.SelectTaskToRename
data.value: Select a task to rename first.

data.name: TaskQueue.Root.DailyStageTooltip
data.value: Inventory data can be updated via ｢Toolbox-Depot Recognition｣

data.name: TaskQueue.Root.OverlayTargetPickerEmptyBody
data.value: Refresh to scan again, or start the target app first.

data.name: TaskQueue.Root.RenameDialogPrompt
data.value: Please enter a new task name:

data.name: TaskQueue.SelectionHint
data.value: Select a task from the left list to edit its settings.

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.EntryDescription
data.value: Unified entry for stage manager, overlay, tray, remote control, notification providers, and WebApi compatibility settings.

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.StageManager.StageCodes.Watermark
data.value: One per line or comma-separated, for example: 1-7, CE-5

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.WebApi.Warning
data.value: This Advanced page keeps compatibility with legacy WebApi clients. Enable it only when you explicitly need external access, and configure an access token whenever possible.

data.name: Toolbox.Error.BusyWithTool
data.value: `{0}` is running. Stop it first before peep.

data.name: Toolbox.Error.GachaDisclaimerRequired
data.value: Please accept the gacha risk disclaimer first.

data.name: Toolbox.Error.RecruitFailed
data.value: Recruit recognition failed. Check current screen and connection status.

data.name: Toolbox.Error.ToolboxBusy
data.value: Toolbox already has a running task. Stop it first.

data.name: Toolbox.BusyDialog.Message
data.value: {0} is still running. Stop it before starting another toolbox task.

data.name: Toolbox.RetryableDialog.Message
data.value: That was impressively fast, and yes, I saw it coming. The toolbox is still getting ready, so try again in a moment.

data.name: Toolbox.Gacha.Disclaimer.Body
data.value: The gacha tool directly operates the current client. Make sure this is not your main account and the emulator is already on the gacha screen.

data.name: Toolbox.Gacha.Tip.1
data.value: Gacha running: peep mode has started automatically.

data.name: Toolbox.Gacha.Tip.2
data.value: You can stop gacha directly on this page.

data.name: Toolbox.Gacha.Tip.3
data.value: If FPS is too high, reduce the peep FPS target.

data.name: Toolbox.Gacha.Tip.4
data.value: If emulator stutters, check screencap mode and connection quality first.

data.name: Toolbox.Gacha.Tip.5
data.value: Gacha uses a custom task chain and will clean up automatically.

data.name: Toolbox.History.ReadFailedEmpty
data.value: Failed to load execution history: empty payload.

data.name: Toolbox.Tip.DepotRecognition
data.value: This feature is still experimental. Please verify results before use. If incorrect, package debug/depot and submit an issue.

data.name: Toolbox.Tip.GachaInit
data.value: On Rhodes Island we gather companions with shared faith. Poetry, war, freedom, and the will to change this land deserve to be remembered.

data.name: Toolbox.Tip.MiniGameNameEmpty
data.value: Select a mini-game above to start.

data.name: Toolbox.Tip.OperBoxRecognition
data.value: Specially-marked operators may affect recognition accuracy. Double-check manually if needed.

data.name: Toolbox.Tip.RecruitPotential
data.value: Use Operator Recognition first to load your operator data.

data.name: Toolbox.Tip.RecruitRecognition
data.value: Tip: this is independent from the main-page auto recruit feature. Open the in-game recruit tags page before using.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.DepotTopNInvalid
data.value: Depot TopN must be between 1 and 500.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.GachaDrawCountInvalid
data.value: Gacha draw count only supports 1 or 10.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.MiniGameSecretFrontEndingInvalid
data.value: When task is `MiniGame@SecretFront`, ending must be one of A~E.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.MiniGameTaskNameEmpty
data.value: Mini-game task name cannot be empty.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.PeepFpsInvalid
data.value: Target peep FPS must be between 1 and 60.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.RecruitSelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Select at least one star level for recruit calculation.

data.name: Toolbox.Validation.RecruitTimeInvalid
data.value: Recruit times must be 10-minute multiples between 60 and 540.

data.name: Toolbox.Warning.GachaMessage
data.value: This feature is risky and may cause unintended pulls. Pressing Confirm means you understand and accept the possible risks.

data.name: UnsupportedLevel
data.value: Unsupported stage, please check the stage name or update resources and try again!

data.name: Main.SchemaMigration.Dialog.Prompt
PostAction.Dialog.Message.Hibernate
data.value: MAA will hibernate this computer in {0} seconds unless you cancel.

data.name: PostAction.Dialog.Message.Shutdown
data.value: MAA will shut down this computer in {0} seconds unless you cancel.

data.name: PostAction.Dialog.Message.Sleep
data.value: MAA will put this computer to sleep in {0} seconds unless you cancel.

data.name: Settings.Start.RestartDialog.Message
data.value: Startup settings were saved. Restart MAA now to apply these changes?

data.name: Settings.Start.RestartManualClose
data.value: A new instance has started. Close the current instance to finish restarting.

data.name: Settings.Start.RestartPending
data.value: Startup settings were saved. Restart MAA later to apply these changes.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.RestartDialog.Message
data.value: The software update package has finished downloading. Restart MAA now to apply the update?

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.RestartLaunched
data.value: Restart has started to apply the software update.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.RestartManualClose
data.value: A new instance has started. Close the current instance to continue applying the update.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.RestartPending
data.value: The update package is ready. Restart MAA later to apply it.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.RestartPendingWhileRunning
data.value: The update package is ready. Current tasks are still running, so restart MAA when idle to apply it.

data.name: Settings.VersionUpdate.SoftwarePlaceholder.Message
data.value: Software update is available. Go to Settings > Version Update to check, download, and apply updates.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.TaskIndexOutOfRange
data.value: Task index {0} is out of range.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.MoveOutOfRange
data.value: Task move index is out of range.

data.name: TaskQueue.Error.TaskTypeMismatch
data.value: Selected task is not a `{0}` task.

data.name: TaskQueue.Warning.MallCreditFightDowngraded
data.value: Disabled Mall credit fight for `{0}` because an enabled `{1}` task uses the current/last stage selector.

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.StageManager.Error.ServiceUnavailable
data.value: Stage manager service is not initialized.

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.StageManager.Error.NoWebResources
data.value: No web stage resources found for `{0}` under `{1}`.

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.StageManager.Error.NoLocalResources
data.value: No local stage resources found for `{0}` under `{1}`.

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.StageManager.Error.ReadResources
data.value: Failed to read stage resources from `{0}`: {1}

data.name: Toolbox.Advanced.ExternalNotification.Error.QueryFailed
data.value: Failed to query external notification providers.
